zh.lifeSummary: 當Mathilde von Arenberg於1278年出生在海因里希_海普洛文次可爾時，她的父親Johann von Arenberg28歲，母親Katharina von Jülich23歲。她於1299年與Engelbert II. von der Mark結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1328年3月18日在德國海因里希_海普洛文次可布倫艾倫布其斯坦阿倫格享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mathilde von Arenberg于1278年出生在海因里希_海普洛文次可爾时，她的父亲Johann von Arenberg28岁，母亲Katharina von Jülich23岁。她于1299年与Engelbert II. von der Mark结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1328年3月18日在德国海因里希_海普洛文次可布倫艾倫布其斯坦阿倫格享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Arenberg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Jewish (Ashkenazic): artificial name composed of the personal name A(a)ron + German Berg ‘mountain’.

nameMeanings.name: Mathilde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Mathilde von Arenberg was born in 1278, in Köln, Rhineland, Prussia, her father, Johann von Arenberg, was 28 and her mother, Katharina von Jülich, was 23. She married Engelbert II. von der Mark in 1299. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 18 March 1328, in Arenberg, Ehrenbreitstein, Coblenz, Rhineland, Prussia, Germany, at the age of 50.

Elle a épousé Engelbert II. von der Mark en 1299. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. ko.Arenberg, Ehrenbreitstein, Landkreis Cob: 독일 플레우ss 리인플로빈츠 컵렌즈 h런브레이츠타인 애런버그
ko.lifeSummary: Mathilde von Arenberg(이)가 1278년 플레우ss 리인플로빈츠 ko에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Johann von Arenberg(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katharina von Jülich(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1299년 Engelbert II. von der Mark(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1328년 3월 18일 독일 플레우ss 리인플로빈츠 컵렌즈 h런브레이츠타인 애런버그에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mathilde von Arenberg родилась в 1278 г. в местности кoлн, раинпровинз, Пруссия, её отцу по имени Johann von Arenberg было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Katharina von Jülich, 23. Она умерла 18 марта 1328 г. в местности аренбирг, эхренбрицтин, кобленц, раинпровинз, Пруссия, Германия в возрасте 50 лет.
